debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut : Type
lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut
outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn
outerWitIn : OuterWitIn
R : Reduction oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec
⊢ (do
      let a ← liftM (Prover.run (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) R.prover)
      Prod.mk (a.1, lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) a.2) <$>
          liftM (lens.stmt.lift outerStmtIn <$> R.verifier.verify (lens.stmt.proj outerStmtIn) a.1)) =
    do
    let a ← liftM (Prover.run (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) R.prover)
    (fun a_1 => ((a.1, lens.lift (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) a.2), lens.stmt.lift outerStmtIn a_1)) <$>
        liftM (R.verifier.verify (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) a.1)

failed_attempts:
simp [Functor.map, liftM, OptionT.lift, bind_assoc, Pure.pure, bind_pure_comp]
  congr

congr
  funext
  simp only [map_eq_bind_pure_comp, bind_pure_comp]
  simp

congr 1
  funext
  simp only [← liftM_map, map_map]
